notes: Official multi-arch image yunique001/elizabeth:1.4.0 publishes linux/amd64 and linux/arm64.
SQLite state is persisted under /app/data; room uploads are persisted under /app/storage.
Container hardening matches the upstream compose: read_only, cap_drop ALL, no-new-privileges, and /tmp tmpfs.
JWT_SECRET uses a required random 1Panel password field instead of a weak fixed production secret.
